scripts.test: docker compose run --rm playwright npx playwright test
scripts.test:staging: docker compose run --rm -e BASE_URL=https://app-embaixadores-staging.onrender.com/app playwright npx playwright test
scripts.test:local: docker compose run --rm -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:8081 playwright npx playwright test
scripts.test:headed: docker compose run --rm playwright npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:ui: docker compose run --rm -p 9323:9323 playwright npx playwright test --ui-host 0.0.0.0 --ui-port 9323
scripts.report: docker compose run --rm -p 9324:9324 playwright npx playwright show-report --host 0.0.0.0 --port 9324 test-results/html
